THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, EDWARD EUGENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 76 6TH STREET, #528, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-10-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WILL HAVE ALLBACK RENTS & U.D. DAMAGES IF DEFT VACATES BY THE ABOVE DATE & TIME. IF DEFT DOES NOT, PLTF WILL HAVE A JUDGE FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $260.00 & U.D.
